Fig. 11: Qualitative results on the Photo Tourism dataset.

Fig. 8: An analysis of 3D Gaussian primitives. (a) The structure from motion (SfM) points via COLMAP leveraging 9-views show sparsity compared to the SfM points resulting from dense image collections. (b) A comparison of the opacity of distributions w/ and w/o SAGR on the Patio scene.

Fig. 4: An overview of sparsity-aware Gaussian replication. (a) Existing work densifies the Gaussians leveraging positional gradients, which makes it difficult to address sparsity in the Gaussian field. (b) In contrast, we utilize opacity information to fill sparse regions, thus enhancing 3D rendering quality.
